source: edep_sino persons.xml (register) + people/*.xml (canonical); works-authored from the work merge

persons.bio: Northern Song statesman and historian; his Jigu lu colophons founded the jinshi tradition.
Qing scholar-official from Qingpu; compiler of the Jinshi cuibian (1805).

works.title_zh: 古泉山館金石文編殘稿
寶素室金石書畫編年録
二百蘭亭齋收藏金石記

persons.bio: Qing epigrapher; his Baqiongshi jinshi buzheng supplements the Jinshi cuibian.

works.title_zh: 非見齋審定六朝正書碑目
元魏熒陽鄭文公摩崖碑跋
雪堂所藏金石文字簿録
漢熹平石經殘字集錄續拾
漢熹平石經集錄又續編
遼慶陵帝后哀册石刻輯録
九鐘精舍金石跋尾甲編
安徽通志金石古物考稿
